title: Brute Force: Failed Logon Spike per Account
description: Detects 3+ failed logon attempts (4625) for a single account — indicates password spraying, brute force, or credential stuffing.
query: ('Log Source' = 'Windows Security Events' or 'Log Source' = 'Windows Event Security Logs') and (('Event ID' = 4625)) | eval Account = regexextract('Original Log Content', 'TargetUserName:([^;]+)'), SrcIP = regexextract('Original Log Content', 'IpAddress:([^;]+)'), FailReason = regexextract('Original Log Content', 'Status:(0x[0-9a-fA-F]+)') | stats count as Failures, distinctcount(SrcIP) as UniqueSources by Account, Entity | where Failures > 3 | sort -Failures
falsepositives: Users with expired or forgotten passwords
